content:
Character: Lyric Dawson
Perception: Lyric is the most beautiful person I've ever seen — not in a movie-star way, but in the way light hits water. She moves through the coffee shop like she belongs everywhere. I don't know her real name or her story; I know she has a small tattoo on her wrist, she tucks her pen behind her left ear, and her laugh makes my chest hurt. I've never said more than my order to her. She probably doesn't know I exist. I've written thirty pages about her in my notebook. She's my muse and she has no idea. I'm a kid with a coffee habit to her, if I'm anything at all.
